description_long: This is a pair of modern, rectangular sunglasses with a bold, full-rim frame and wide temples. The frame appears robust and slightly angular, giving it a contemporary and urban aesthetic. The lenses are dark-tinted, providing substantial coverage and privacy, and are seamlessly integrated into the frame. The bridge is solid and straight, connecting the two lenses without any visible nose pads. The temples are thick and straight, with a subtle engraving or marking visible on the side, adding a touch of detail. Overall, the design is sleek, minimalistic, and functional, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A pair of modern, rectangular sunglasses with a bold full-rim frame, dark lenses, and wide, detailed temples.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular shape, full-rim frame, and dark-tinted lenses.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thick temples and visible engraving or marking on the arm.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the straight alignment of the temples and the overall width of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thickness and straightness of the temples, mirroring the other side.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with bold, thick geometry and straight, wide temples. The design is minimalistic and modern, with no visible embellishments except for a subtle marking on the temple.
attribute_lens_tint: Dark, opaque tint with uniform coloration, providing high coverage and privacy. No gradient or mirrored effect is visible.
attribute_bridge_style: Solid, straight bridge with no visible nose pads or additional features, seamlessly connecting the two lenses.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are thick, straight, and feature a subtle engraved or embossed marking on the outer side, adding a touch of detail to the otherwise minimalistic design.
attribute_brand_logo: A marking is visible on the temple, possibly a brand logo or insignia, but the specific brand name or symbol is not clearly identifiable.
